title: File write permissions issue in n8n
symptom: The node executes successfully but the data disappears without being written to the file. No error messages are shown.
not_this_if: File write operation succeeds in other workflows
root_cause: The n8n instance running in a container may not have the necessary permissions to write to the specified folder on the host machine. This can lead to successful execution notifications without actual data being written.
fix_steps: Identify the folder where n8n is trying to write files
Change the folder permissions to allow write access for the n8n user
Retry the file write operation in n8n
agent_instruction: Ensure the n8n container has write permissions to the target folder.
